div1.entryFree: Intimate, vb. to suggest, to cause to think of: your father here doth i. the payment of a hundred thousand crowns, LLL II, 129. thou this to hazard needs must i. skill infinite, All's II, 1, 186 (thy hazarding this must suggest the idea of infinite skill). the spirit of humours i. reading aloud to him, Tw. II, 5, 94.
